form.formComment: Racing well recently. Most recently won by a head at this track Bm82 (81) March 23 over 1590m in heavy going defeating Do It For You with 58.5kg at $4.20. The race before that ran on strongly from last on the turn; 2nd of 8 at Doomben Cl5 on March 4 over 1350m, 1.5 len behind Acappella Sun with 57kg at $51. Revels in soft going so today's conditions not ideal - still commands respect.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. At the latest run 2nd of 9 at this track Bm82 (81) on March 23 over 1590m, in the wet; head behind Resurrected with 55kg at $2.90. Before that raced right near the speed and boxed on; won by 4.5 len at Lismore Ctry Bm58 February 10 over 1420m in soft going defeating She's Enuff with 58.5kg at $1.50. Racing in great heart this prep and is expected to be very competitive again.

form.formComment: Gelding returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last preparation sixth of 8 at Ipswich Bm65 January 21 over 2190m, soft track; 5.5 len behind Lovey Dovey with 55.5kg at $19. First up last campaign fifth of 8 at Ipswich Bm65 November 13 over 1680m, 1.75 len behind Moonshine Run with 59kg at $6. Each-way claims from the good gate with no weight.
